com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager

Interface IXBridgePrePostProcessor

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXBridgeExportPostProcessor, IXBridgeImportPreProcessor

    @NotToBeImplementedDirectly
public interface IXBridgePrePostProcessor
extends IXPlugin
    This plugin is used to process adaptor data while doing Bridge In or Bridge Out.
    See Also:
    to process adaptor data during Bridge In, to process adaptor data during Bridge Out

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean isAdaptorFormatHandledByPlugin(java.lang.String adaptorFormatDescription)
      Whether this processor handles the given adaptor format
      boolean process(java.lang.String adaptorFormatDescription, java.io.InputStream adaptorData, java.io.OutputStream processedAdaptorData, IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
      Process or modify the adaptor data that is bridged in/out.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • isAdaptorFormatHandledByPlugin

        boolean isAdaptorFormatHandledByPlugin(java.lang.String adaptorFormatDescription)
        Whether this processor handles the given adaptor format
        Parameters:
        adaptorFormatDescription - format description of the adaptor data to be processed. Refer to "<capital_home>/adaptors/adaptors.xml" file section "1- Adaptors declarations" for the description string of each format. For example, "DSI Harness", "KBL Adaptor", etc.

        This processor is not recommended for 'X2ML' and 'HX2ML' formats. If processing is required for 'X2ML' or 'HX2ML' format data, then use appropriate sub-class of IXBridgeProcessor

        Returns:
        true if this plugin handles the given adaptor format, false otherwise

      • process

        boolean process(java.lang.String adaptorFormatDescription,
                java.io.InputStream adaptorData,
                java.io.OutputStream processedAdaptorData,
                IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
         throws java.lang.Exception
        Process or modify the adaptor data that is bridged in/out. This is invoked only if isAdaptorFormatHandledByPlugin(String) returns true for the given adaptor format
        Parameters:
        adaptorFormatDescription - format description of the adaptor data to be processed. Refer to "<capital_home>/adaptors/adaptors.xml" file section "1- Adaptors declarations" for the description string of each format. For example, "DSI Harness", "KBL Adaptor", etc.

        This processor is not recommended for 'X2ML' and 'HX2ML' formats. If processing is required for 'X2ML' or 'HX2ML' format data, then use appropriate sub-class of IXBridgeProcessor

        adaptorData - the original adaptor data stream to be bridged in/out without any modification
        processedAdaptorData - the adaptor data stream which is to contain the processed data by this processor
        applicationContext - the application context. From this object, the current "bridge context" IXBridgeContext may be obtained. Also, the current design, project and currently selected objects may be obtained.

        Returns:
        true if 'adaptorData' is processed and the processed data is written into 'processedAdaptorData'; false otherwise.

        If 'true' is returned, then the content of 'processedAdaptorData' is used for Bridge In or Bridge Out

        If 'false' is returned, then the original content of 'adaptorData' is used for Bridge In or Bridge Out

        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - any exception that is thrown during the processing of adaptor data
